'''Tshindral III''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planetoid]] near the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] with a scant, toxic [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] which could corrode a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter's]] hulls in less than a local day. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by [[Starlyte Station]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] experiments on the [[Space station/Legends|station]] had destroyed the ecosystem of the once-tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]] below. Tshindral III had a local day 25 standard hours long and a year 300 local days long.
